title: Four Zeros and Vergia Join Forces to Advance UK Green Hydrogen Portfolio
content: Swiss Life-owned Vergia partners with Four Zeros Energy to co-develop and finance UK green hydrogen projects, starting with the HAR2-shortlisted St Austell Green Hydrogen project in Cornwall. The 20MW facility will produce 2,000 tonnes of green hydrogen annually, replacing natural gas in mining, with a final investment decision set for 2026 and operations planned for 2028.
author: Analysts Account
